column29: note
Crazyflie sidewall lift decreases slightly; sidewall effect is much smaller than ground/ceiling effect.
The paper says |Delta L| exceeds about 2% only for z/R < 0.3.
Differential rotor lift close to the wall can drive roll torque even when total lift change is small.
Crazyflie estimate; not a direct 5-inch FPV force target.
Paper tests wall effect distances normalized by propeller radius and treats D > 10R as negligible wall effect.
Force coefficients rose as wall distance decreased, but values stayed small and uncertainty was important.
Reported for the n_infinity=4000 RPM case with 12x5 propellers.
The paper quotes a 15x5.5 quadrotor CFD reference force at 1.2R from the wall.
The same quoted CFD reference torque has high relative uncertainty for small force/torque sensors.
The paper concludes wall proximity has negligible impact on total thrust, while force/moment toward the wall grows near the wall.
Geometric disk area cut by a planar wall. At d/R=1 the disk is tangent and overlap is zero; at d/R=0 the wall passes through the disk center and overlap is 0.5.
